title: Truist Financial: Bargain Hunting For Value And Yield In Financial Institutions
text: Truist Financial Corporation is undervalued and represents a long-term investment opportunity. The financial sector may face challenges in 2024 due to potential interest rate cuts and a possible recession. TFC is adapting to the digital banking trend and has seen increased engagement in its mobile app and digital transactions.

title: Truist to present at the Goldman Sachs US Financial Services Conference
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Nov. 21, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today announced that Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Bill Rogers will present at the Goldman Sachs 2023 US Financial Services Conference at 10:40 a.m.

title: Truist Financial: Buying In A Solid Base At Technical Support Levels
text: Truist Financial Corporation faced challenges and strategic adjustments in Q3 2023, resulting in a decrease in Adjusted PPNR and total revenues. The bank showed resilience with a slight improvement in net interest margin and stable asset quality indicators. The stock price of Truist Financial Corporation is exhibiting a strong bullish formation, potentially poised for gains.

title: AppBrilliance Announces Strategic Investment by Truist Ventures
text: New capital will help expand operations as they add additional strategic partners AUSTIN, Texas , Nov. 20, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- AppBrilliance, the leading platform for real-time Account-to-Account (A2A) payment acceptance, announced today that it has closed a strategic investment from Truist Ventures , the corporate venture capital arm of Truist Financial (NYSE: TFC). Truist Ventures invests in Startup that unlocks FedNow and RTP for Pay-by-Bank The investment allows AppBrilliance to further develop it's IP portfolio and expand its resources to support rapid growth and interest from financial institutions and other strategic partners looking to incorporate real-time payments (RTP) into their Pay-by-Bank offerings.

title: The 3 Best Bank Stocks to Survive Higher Yields
text: The banking crisis in March 2023 affected even the best bank stocks as higher interest rates put pressure on liquidity. With interest rates at 5% compared with March's 4.75%, risks remain due to tighter lending standards and potentially higher yields.

title: 15 A-Rated 6% Yielding SWANs Perfect For What's Coming Next
text: Americans are increasingly worried about job losses, and long-term inflation expectations are at a 12-year high. Leading economic indicators suggest a potential recession within three months, while unemployment is predicted to rise, and stagflation is a concern. A-rated ultra-yielding SWANs are a great way to invest money wisely during a high uncertainty period. Rock-solid balance sheets, great risk management, and safe ultra-yield is always in fashion.

title: Truist names Beau Cummins chief operating officer and Dontá Wilson chief consumer & small business banking officer; hires Kristin Lesher as new chief wholesale banking officer
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C. , Nov. 14, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) today announced continued progress in the company's transformation journey with the creation of a chief operating officer position, the naming of a new chief consumer & small business banking officer and the hiring of a new chief wholesale banking officer.

title: Why Upstart, Redfin, and Truist Stocks Are All Surging Higher Today
text: Upstart, Redfin, and Truist have all been stymied by rising rates, which has slowed demand for housing and consumer loans and made lending more difficult. The latest data suggests that inflation is cooling, igniting a share rally.

title: Q3 List Of Banks And Their Increasing Paper Losses In Their Debt Securities Portfolios
text: Many banks have reported significantly larger unrealized securities losses in 3Q as interest rates rose in the quarter. The unrealized losses have grown so large as to be orange flags for a few banks. One of the reasons there could be new increased capital requirements is because of the large unrealized losses across the banking industry.

title: Mendoza Ventures closes Truist Ventures' investment for its $100M Early Growth Fintech fund
text: BOSTON, Nov. 8, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Mendoza Ventures , a female and Latinx-founded Fintech, AI, and Cybersecurity Venture Capital firm, today announced that Truist Ventures is investing in its Early Growth Fintech Fund as a limited partner. The fund is targeting $100M and will invest in early growth-stage startups with a focus on diverse teams.

title: JPMorgan's and PNC's mixed outlook on net interest income draws attention from analyst after industry gathering
text: Big U.S. banks have signaled that they expect net interest income to bottom out in the next few quarters as they keep an eye on whether the cost of consumer deposits will come down, a bank analyst said in a research note on Monday.

title: 7 Dirt-Cheap Bank Stocks with Massive Dividends
text: Bank stocks are down badly this year. Borrowing costs are sky-high, cutting into net interest income.

title: 5 Relatively Secure And Cheap Dividend Stocks To Invest In - November 2023
text: This article is part of our monthly series where we highlight five large-cap, relatively safe, dividend-paying companies offering large discounts to their historical norms. We go over our filtering process to select just five conservative DGI stocks from more than 7,500 companies that are traded on U.S. exchanges, including OTC networks. In addition to the primary list that yields just over 3%, we present two other groups of five DGI stocks each, with the goal of moderate to high yields.

title: US regional banks shares surge after Bill Gross says they have hit bottom
text: Shares of a handful of U.S. regional banks popped on Thursday after famed bond investor Bill Gross said the danger in investing in them had passed.

title: My Top 10 High Yield Dividend Stocks For November 2023
text: The market slide continues in October with the SPDR S&P 500 Trust ETF dropping by 2.17%, marking three consecutive months of losses for the fund. The top 10 stocks on the watchlist for November 2023 offer a 4.58% dividend yield, more than double the S&P 500. My top 10 list of high dividend yield stocks has generated an annualized rate of return of 8.20% since its inception in November 2020.
